name: Double Chocolate Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt butter and chocolate. Remove from heat.
3. Blend in sugar, eggs, crème de cacao, vanilla extract, and salt. Beat until smooth.
4. Pour into the pie shell. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until set. Cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes.
5. While still hot, spread chocolate chips on top.
6. Serve with ice cream or whipped cream. Enjoy your delicious Double Chocolate Chess Pie!
